entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species whose cultivars' impact on genetic diversity and yield stability is being studied

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of genetic characteristics within a crop species, essential for improvement and survival

entities.name: YIELD STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of crop yield over time and across environments

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that cause production losses in crops

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions that cause production losses in crops

entities.name: NUCLEAR GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: Genetic variation found in the nucleus of a cell

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: Genetic variation found in the cytoplasm of a cell

entities.name: BLIGHT
entities.description: A plant disease causing rapid tissue death, specifically mentioned regarding potatoes

entities.name: POTATOES
entities.description: The crop affected by blight in the northern hemisphere in the 1840s

entities.name: NORTHERN HEMISPHERE
entities.description: The geographic region where temperate potatoes were affected by blight

entities.name: SOUTHERN CORN LEAF BLIGHT
entities.description: A specific disease epidemic that affected maize in the USA in 1970

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The crop affected by the southern corn leaf blight epidemic

entities.name: USA
entities.description: The country where the southern corn leaf blight epidemic occurred
